title: Delicious in minecraft
description: This mod adds more loot and foods deriving from hostile mobs and more.
body:
This mods implements more loot to hostile mobs which do not have any or not have enough.

the current content of the mod is:

- spider leg = is dropped by spiders and cave spiders, can be cooked into cooked spider leg.
  
- cooked spider leg = is obtained by cooking spider leg.

- raw phantom flesh = is dropped by phantoms, can be cooked into cooked phantom flesh.

- cooked phantom flesh = is obtained by cooking raw phantom flesh.

- dust marrow = is obtained by smelting bones, can be crafted into gray dye.

- cooked dust marrow = is obtained by cooking dust marrow.

- endermite = is dropped by endermites, can be cooked into silverfish.

- silverfish = is dropped by silverfishes, can be cooked into cooked silverfish and is also obtained by cooking endermite.

- cooked silverfish = is obtained by cooking endermite.

- shulker head = is dropped by shulkers, can be cooked into cooked shulker head.

- cooked shulker head = is obtained by cooking shulker head.

- ghast tentacle = is dropped by ghasts, can be eaten to gain the negative status effect: spooked, or brewed into spooked potions.

- creeper membrane = is dropped by creepers, can be crafted into green dye.

- warden bone = is dropped by the warden, can be crafted into a great amount of bone meal.

- guardian shell = is dropped by guardians, can be crafted into prismarine shards.

- blazing sprite = is dropped by blazes, can be consumed to gain the fiery soul status effect or crafted into blaze powder.

- guardian soup = is crafted from one fish, one guardian shell, one kelp, one prismarine crystal and one bowl, gives water breathing when eaten.

- caving stew = is crafted from one bone, one string, one cooked spider leg, one cooked dust marrow and one bowl.

- nether soup = is crafted from one ghast tentacle, one crimson fungus, one rotten flesh and one bowl, gives hardened when eaten.

- end stew = is crafted from two chorus fruit, one cooked shulker head, one ender pearl and one bowl

- dark stew = is crafted from one deepslate, two sculk, one warden bone and one bowl, gives darkness when eaten.





- spooked status effect = whenever the afflicted mob takes damage, they will take and extra half a heart of damage, scales.

- fiery soul status effect = buffs the afflicted mob's attack, but damages them until they will be left with 2.5 hearts, scales.

- hardened status effect = buffs the afflicted mob's armor, scales.


- I... don't think that's right advancement = advancement given when crafting a lava cake.
